---
title: "Giuseppe Peressotti"
image: pic1.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:Giuseppe.Peressotti@utdallas.edu"
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV
      href: CV_research_peressotti_jan2026.pdf
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=qdYq504AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/GiuseppePeressotti"
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/giuseppe-peressotti-57b6a614b/"
    - text: Bluesky
      href: "https://bsky.app/profile/gperessotti.bsky.social"
---

I am a PhD candidate in Public Policy and Political Economy at the [University of Texas at Dallas](https://epps.utdallas.edu/), expected 2027. **I will be on the 2026--2027 academic job market.**

My research focuses on **international political economy**  (trade policy, digital governance, and international organizations/institutions) with a secondary field in **conflict and peace studies**, examining civil resistance and democratic transitions.

My work has been published in the *European Journal of International Relations* and the *Journal of Peace Research*.

::: interests
## Research Interests

-   Digital Trade Governance
-   Preferential Trade Agreements
-   Network Analysis
-   Civil Resistance & Democratization
-   Institutional Design
:::

## Recent News

-   **2025** — "Digital Provision Inclusion in Trade Agreements" published in *EJIR* (OnlineFirst)
-   **2025** — "Mapping the ROAD to Democracy" forthcoming in *Journal of Peace Research*

## Beyond Academia

When not researching, I enjoy lifting weights, hunting the best coffee shops in the cities I visit, and nerd-out on my espresso setup at home.
